abstract.t: This document defines a new IPv6 Hop-by-Hop Option that enables Minimum Rate Limit Discovery along the forward path between a source host and a destination host. Each router along the path can update the option with the minimum of its local Maximum Rate (MRate) and the recorded value. The discovered rate can then be communicated back to the source via a return mechanism, enabling the source to adapt its transmission rate to match the bottleneck link capacity and queue buffer.
